mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEM_PRED_NUM (round_no, member_no, pred_num, submit_at) VALUES (#{roundNo}, #{memberNo}, #{predNum}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.ROUND_NO AS roundNo, r.ROUND_DATE AS roundDate, r.NUM1 AS num1, r.NUM2 AS num2, r.NUM3 AS num3, r.NUM4 AS num4, r.NUM5 AS num5, r.NUM6 AS num6, r.BONUS_NUM AS bonusNum, p.pred_num AS predNum, p.hit_yn AS hitYn, p.submit_at AS submitAt FROM LTT_ROUND_RESULT r LEFT JOIN MEM_PRED_NUM p ON r.ROUND_NO = p.round_no AND p.member_no = #{memberNo} LEFT JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO j ON j.member_no = #{memberNo} WHERE j.create_ts <= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(r.round_date, ' 19:00:00'), '%Y%m%d %H:%i:%s') ORDER BY r.ROUND_NO DESC
